name: Shrimp and Crab Toast on French Baguettes w Fresh Plum Sauc
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons Chinese rice wine or sherry
1/4 pound fresh shrimp, shelled and deveined
1 tablespoon minced scallion (white and light green parts)
recipeInstructions:
1. Leave the baguette slices out on a rack overnight to dry, or place them in a low oven for about 10 minutes per side until dry to the touch.
2. Mince the shrimp and crabmeat to a paste. Combine with minced ginger, scallion, lard, salt, rice wine, water, cornstarch, and diced water chestnuts. Stir well in one direction to blend.
3. Fold in the beaten egg white.
4. Using a broad-bladed sandwich spreader, mound the shrimp mixture on a bread slice to a thickness of about 3/4 inch, tapering at the edges to form a smooth dome.
5. Sprinkle sesame seeds and ham bits thinly on top, then press a single coriander leaf.
6. Deep-fry until golden, about 4 minutes, turning occasionally to brown all sides.
7. Remove promptly to paper towels to drain. Serve with warm or cooled plum sauce.
Plum Sauce: Pureed soft plums simmered with sugar, rice vinegar, and plum wine to taste.
